author: Ishan Godawatta
name: 11L XSA + LQER + SparseAttnGate + BOS-Fixed SmearGate + 9-hparam stack + SWA blend
blurb: PR #1855's full stack (11L 512d 8H/4KV transformer with U-Net skips, parallel residuals, partial RoPE, Polar-Express Newton-Schulz Muon, LQER asymmetric int4 rank-4 quant correction, sparse attention head-output gate, BOS-fixed SmearGate, fused LeakyReLU-square MLP, fused softcapped CE Triton kernel, GPTQ int6 + int7 embed + per-row int8 attn-gate, per-group lrzip compression, phased TTT eval (3 phases, prefix=2500 docs), 9 hyperparameter overrides) — PLUS Stochastic Weight Averaging blended into the EMA shadow before GPTQ. 3-seed mean: 1.06140 BPB (std 0.00044), beating PR #1855 by -0.00032 BPB.
technique_summary: PR #1855 stack (11L XSA + LQER int4-rank4 + SparseAttnGate + BOS-fixed SmearGate + Polar-Express Muon + per-group lrzip compression + 9-hparam stack) + SWA blend (final 5%, snapshot every 50 steps, blend 0.5 into EMA shadow before GPTQ).
